entries.hypothesis: z(mom_12_1m) − vol_w·z(vol_60d) at vol_w=1.0 generates phase-robust net positive OOS excess vs SPY with multi-phase mean α t ≥ 2.39 (Bonferroni-corrected at n=3, α=0.05) on R2000-like PIT universe, ADV ≥ $5M, 5–15bp cost.

params_frozen.universe: AlphaLens R2000-like PIT, no survivorship bias

success_criteria.pass_rule: Multi-phase audit per docs/research/strategy_validation_playbook.md Step 4-5: every-phase α t ≥ 1.5 AND mean α t ≥ Bonferroni threshold AND every-phase excess net ≥ 0
success_criteria.regime_caveat: 2017-2022 subsample IS Sharpe 0.16, excess −11.3% — STRUCTURAL hole, not vol-regime-filterable per orthogonal experiments

outcome.notes: Phase-robust FAIL. OOS 2023-2026 mean αt=+0.49 (±1.05, min=-0.53 max=+1.66), mean excess net -5.7%/y (±44.5pp dispersion). IS 2011-2022 mean αt=+0.67, mean excess net -1.1%/y. Majority of phases negative on excess net. Single-phase OOS Sharpe 0.55 from 2026-04-29 strategy search was phase-1 outlier; phases 2+3 produced αt=-0.39/-0.53 with excess net -33.9%/-67.0%. The 44.5pp OOS dispersion confirms phase-aliasing was the source of apparent alpha. Pre-registered Bonferroni gate t≥2.39 (n=3) FAR from cleared.

entries.hypothesis: 60d-drawdown + 5d bounce contrarian, ADV+cost-stressed, generates positive OOS net 4F α on R2000-like PIT universe.

params_frozen.universe: AlphaLens R2000-like PIT, no survivorship bias

success_criteria.pass_rule: OOS net 4F α t ≥ 1.0 AND OOS Sharpe ≥ 0.5 AND α stable across ADV ≥ $5M/$20M

outcome.notes: OOS net α at ADV ≥ $5M = −52%/y (t=−0.88). The 150%/y zero-ADV headline was tail-rebound artifact of un-tradeable names. Backfilled retrospectively.
